raw_title: Book Review: ‘The American School of Spies,’ by Stephan Talty
book_title: ‘The American School of Spies,’ by Stephan Talty
description: In “The American School of Spies,” Stephan Talty tells the story of the desperate struggle to preserve antiquities during World War II.

raw_title: Book Review: ‘This Dark Night: Emily Brontë, a Life,’ by Deborah Lutz
book_title: ‘This Dark Night: Emily Brontë, a Life,’ by Deborah Lutz
description: In her lyrical new biography, “This Dark Night,” Deborah Lutz shines light on the most enigmatic of the literary, secluded Brontë sisters.
